name: Synapse/ADF Pipelines to Fabric Data Factory Migration
description: Migrate Azure Synapse / Azure Data Factory pipelines to Fabric Data Factory — map Linked Services to Connections, global parameters to a Variable Library, deploy, and validate.
prerequisites: Source pipeline JSON (activities, datasets, linked services, triggers)
Target Fabric workspace with F2+ capacity

steps.description: Map each Linked Service to a Fabric Connection. Create missing connections; record their IDs.
Move ADF global parameters into a Variable Library (dev/test/prod value sets) instead of hardcoding.
Recreate the pipeline. Translate activities: Copy -> Copy activity, Notebook -> Notebook activity, Stored Proc -> Script/SP activity. Datasets become inline source/sink definitions.
For .platform-format pipeline exports, scan connection GUIDs and generate a parameter file to remap them.
steps.notes: Edit params.json to fill in the correct target connection IDs.

steps.description: Deploy the pipeline with resolved connections.
Run and validate the migrated pipeline end-to-end.

tips: ADF triggers -> Fabric job schedules (fabio data-pipeline create-schedule).
IntegrationRuntime concepts do not migrate — Fabric manages compute; on-prem sources use gateways/connections.
Use 'fabio deploy plan' (dry-run) before apply to review the changeset.
Route the overall effort with 'fabio context persona migration-engineer'.
